Guaiacum.personality: A constitutionally weakened individual prone to deep-seated rheumatic and gouty conditions, with progressive physical deterioration. They are fundamentally rigid and contracted in nature, both physically (shortened tendons, stiff joints) and temperamentally (obstinate, indolent), reflecting a system that has become fixed and resistant to change.
Guaiacum.mental_state: Absent-minded particularly in the morning, with forgetfulness and a progressive weakness of mind accompanying the bodily decline. There is a mental sluggishness and indolence that mirrors the physical exhaustion, suggesting a mind that has become as stiff and unresponsive as the contracted limbs.
Guaiacum.emotional_pattern: Low-spirited and fretful, with an underlying obstinacy that resists both comfort and correction. The emotional state is one of irritable resignation — a person worn down by chronic suffering who becomes peevish and contrary, yet lacks the vitality to express stronger emotions.
